name: spectramining-ai
description: SpectraMining AI: FOSS satellite-driven mineral observation framework

scripts.dev: npx -y concurrently -k -p "[{name}]" -n "frontend,backend" -c "cyan,green" "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "python -m uvicorn main:app --app-dir backend --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8000 --reload"
